scripts.prepare: npm run sync:docs && npm run prepare:docs
scripts.build: [ -x prototypes/docusaurus/node_modules/.bin/docusaurus ] || npm --prefix prototypes/docusaurus install; npm --prefix prototypes/docusaurus run build
scripts.build:full: npm run prepare && npm run build
scripts.cloudflare:deploy: npm run build:full && npx wrangler pages deploy prototypes/docusaurus/build --project-name ${CLOUDFLARE_PAGES_PROJECT:-shakapacker-com}
